args.code: (()=>{try{var els=document.querySelectorAll('div, span, p');var seasonDay='';for(var i=0;i<els.length;i++){var t=els[i].innerText||'';if(t.indexOf('夏季')>=0||t.indexOf('秋季')>=0||t.indexOf('春季')>=0||t.indexOf('冬季')>=0){if(t.indexOf('天')>=0){seasonDay=t;break;}}}return{seasonDay:seasonDay,healthText:document.querySelector('[class*=health], [class*=heart]')?.innerText||'',moneyText:document.querySelector('[class*=money]')?.innerText||''};}catch(e){return{error:e.message};}})()
